test_strategy_covers_all_types.evidence: Test strategy covers prompt content verification (unit-level), cross-agent consistency (integration-level), hook regression (integration-level), and state schema validation (unit-level). Security N/A (prompt-only changes). Performance N/A (no runtime code). E2E validated via existing cli-lifecycle.test.js (no regressions expected).

test_cases_for_all_requirements.evidence: 26 test cases cover all 22 ACs across 6 FRs. TC-01 through TC-08 with detailed Given/When/Then and code examples. See docs/requirements/REQ-0006-parallel-test-execution/test-cases.md.

traceability_matrix_complete.evidence: 40-row traceability matrix maps all 22 ACs to test cases with priorities (P0-P2) and test file locations. 100% AC coverage. See docs/requirements/REQ-0006-parallel-test-execution/test-traceability-matrix.csv.

coverage_targets_defined.evidence: 100% AC coverage required. All 4 execution agents verified for framework table consistency. All 3 fallback agents verified for sequential fallback. No new hooks or dependencies (Article XII, Article V compliance checks).

test_data_strategy_documented.evidence: Test data plan defines agent file paths, expected content patterns (7 frameworks, parallel flags, CPU patterns, state schema fields), baseline data for regression, and boundary cases. See docs/requirements/REQ-0006-parallel-test-execution/test-data-plan.md.

critical_paths_identified.evidence: Critical paths: (1) Framework detection table correctness (P0), (2) Sequential fallback protocol (P0 -- highest risk per impact analysis), (3) Cross-agent consistency (P0), (4) State schema correctness (P1). ATDD mode exclusion identified as risk mitigation (P1).

article_II.note: 26 test cases designed before implementation (Phase 05 before Phase 06). All tests use node:test. 100% AC coverage targeted.

article_VII.note: 40-row traceability matrix maps every AC to test cases. AC IDs appear in test case names (TC-01.1 -> AC-01.1, etc.). No orphan tests.

article_IX.note: All 6 GATE-05 checklist items validated and passed. Gate not bypassed or weakened.

article_XI.note: Cross-agent consistency test (TC-07.1) validates component interaction (shared lookup table). Hook regression ensures test-watcher still works with parallel commands. Integration test approach follows existing project patterns.
